description_long: This is a modern, military-style jet airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The wings are mid-mounted and feature pronounced anhedral angles, giving the aircraft a distinctive aggressive stance. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a tinted, streamlined canopy, suggesting a single or dual-seat configuration. The airplane is equipped with twin jet engines mounted on either side of the rear fuselage, and the tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a visible nose wheel and main gear under the wings. The exterior is finished in a matte gray color scheme with subtle panel lines and minimal markings.
description: A sleek, gray military jet with swept-back mid-mounted wings, twin rear jet engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, twin rear jet engines, and the angular shape of the tail and wings.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and the tricycle landing gear with the nose wheel extended.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetry of the wings and landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the fuselage, engines, and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and pronounced anhedral angles; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on either side of the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units; gear appears retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy, likely single or dual-seat.
